title: Mapping Celestia’s Network
text: “The Lord has been and is very kind to me in giving me so many friends may I ever be grateful for all his benefits.” Celestia Webster’s Diary - May 17, 1867

title: Celestia’s World
text: “My throat troubles me considerable this winter. I begin to be afraid that it is going to be something serious. It hurts me to talk after talking so much in school, I have been very quiet.” Celestia Webster - January 9, 1867

title: Mapping Celestia’s Boarding
text: “The school room has been very uncomfortable and I was very glad when the last lesson was heard and I ready to come to my boarding place I thought certainly it would rain, sat up some time wanting for it to rain then retired feeling that the goodness of God was about my pathway.” Celestia Webster’s Diary - July 17, 1866

title: Mapping Trips to Aunt Zerviah’s
text: “They have all with the exception of Mother Lib and me gone to Aunt Zerviah to spend the evening I tired out every day by dark as I have no place to lie down and rest during the day. Lib and I am going to retire early” Celestia Webster’s Diary - November 13, 1867
